55 
NN_CORE_SFTY_OPTOUT_SW 
LABEL: 
Navigated Core HRSN Safety Opted Out 
DESCRIPTION: Navigation needs (NN): navigated core health related social need (HRSN) safety opted out. 
LONG NAME: NN_CORE_SFTY_OPTOUT_SW 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
AHC data system (derived) 
VALUES: 
0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Missing 
COMMENT: 
Variables that start with “NN” include information for each core
